releases.name: Linux Security Lite 1.0.3
releases.author: auditadmin
releases.body_md:
**Linux Security Lite 1.0.3** — the standalone, Linux-only security-audit tool in the AuditToolkit suite. First 1.0.3 baseline after full functional + UI alignment review.

### Three Linux packages
| Package | Distributions |
| --- | --- |
| `.deb` | Debian, Ubuntu and derivatives |
| `.rpm` (noarch) | RHEL, Fedora, AlmaLinux, Rocky, CentOS Stream, openSUSE/SLES, Amazon Linux |
| `.tar.gz` | Any other Linux distribution (generic/offline) |

All three bundle an offline Python wheelhouse and are served by the `audittoolkit-linux-security-lite-web` systemd service on `127.0.0.1:8089`.

### Highlights
- Web console re-engineered to the suite left-nav shell (dark, left menu + right detail) with a matching dark login
- Documentation reader aligned to the central customer-docs model (docs repo -> Control Centre)
- Documentation Centre now resolves EULA/License/Disclaimer; `DISCLAIMER.md` packaged in all formats
- Versions reconciled to a single 1.0.3 baseline

Verify downloads against `SHA256SUMS-1.0.3.txt`. See `README.md` for install commands and `CHANGELOG.md` for the full change list.
